title: Reverse Bits
content:
Reverse bits of a given 32 bits signed integer.

Example 1:

Input: n = 43261596

Output: 964176192

Explanation: 				Integer
				Binary

				43261596
				00000010100101000001111010011100

				964176192
				00111001011110000010100101000000

Example 2:

Input: n = 2147483644

Output: 1073741822

Explanation: 				Integer
				Binary

				2147483644
				01111111111111111111111111111100

				1073741822
				00111111111111111111111111111110

Constraints:

• 0 <= n <= 231 - 2

• n is even.

Follow up: If this function is called many times, how would you optimize it?

solutions.explanation:
Extract each bit from right. Shift result left, append bit.
Time: O(1)
Space: O(1)
